name: Beverwyks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and eggs with butter until well combined.
2. Gradually add the rest of the ingredients to the mixture.
3. Add more flour if needed so that the dough can be rolled out easily.
4. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and cut into various shapes.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
